johnsonGenesis.description: GM tool for generating Mr. Johnson NPCs based on organizational background. Covers megacorporate, syndicate, extremist, and amateur Johnson types with behavioral profiles.

notorietyTriggers.description: Actions that earn runners Notoriety when dealing with Johnsons
triggers: Being noticed using Manipulation magic under normal circumstances
Showing up at a meet heavily armed in an environment that doesn't warrant it
Being caught hacking the Johnson's commlink under normal circumstances
Killing a Johnson who paid you

megacorporateJohnsons.description: Big Ten AAA megacorp Johnson profiles. Corporate Johnsons are full-time professionals trained for the role, typically former lawyers, project managers, consultants, or military/security officers.

generalTraits.retainerRisk: Repeated success may lead to retainer offer (company suit)
generalTraits.obfuscation: Johnsons always hide which corporation they work for

profiles.name: Ares Macrotechnology

paymentStyle.notes: Everything is 'just a figure' for them

profiles.betrayalNotes: Know they have good rep; will use betrayal fully if situation requires it
specialWarnings: Excalibur fiasco has stirred distrust in the shadows

profiles.name: Aztechnology

paymentStyle.notes: Provide lots of assistance to teams. May try to pay in Aztechnology scrip (decline and continue negotiating)

profiles.betrayalNotes: Overall corporate plan to dominate/destroy the world colors all dealings
specialWarnings: Tendency to hide affiliation by mimicking other corps' employment conditions

profiles.name: Evo Corporation

paymentStyle.notes: Known to offer cyber/bioware with medical installation as payment

specialWarnings: Top security at every meet regardless of job size
Johnsons are usually metahumans who play up friendliness to metas

profiles.name: Horizon
profiles.betrayalNotes: Dawkins Group association -- can destroy anyone with minimal effort
specialWarnings: Johnson doubles as a fixer
Team-oriented approach: consider whole op as single team
High drug use (mostly novacoke) and high burnout/cycling rate
Dawkins Group is the underlying bogeyman -- they erase people and convince them to give up everything

profiles.name: Mitsuhama Computer Technologies

paymentStyle.notes: Failure means no payment AND refund of any advance. Success pays exceedingly well

profiles.betrayalNotes: May send kill squad if you fail and accepted money
specialWarnings: Entire run pre-planned in detail (maps, covers, weapon caches, vehicles)
Demand plan is followed to the letter
Distinction: direct MCT Johnson vs MCT subcontracting through Yakuza -- if Yakuza, use Yakuza profile instead

profiles.name: NeoNET
profiles.betrayalNotes: Building reliable teams is their priority
specialWarnings: NeoNET lacks central corporate culture (Novatech + Erika + Transys + fuchi remnants)
Form webs of secret agents with fierce internal competition
Johnsons lend teams to colleagues to show off
Miles Lanier's back-channel network (now CFD-afflicted) works better than official channels
Expect to be shipped around the globe

profiles.name: Renraku Computer Systems

paymentStyle.notes: Predictable income and access to equipment if on retainer

profiles.betrayalNotes: Internal politics mean Johnson's enemies become your enemies
specialWarnings: First 2-3 runs are auditions; then retainer offer comes (they insist you accept)
Company teams get attached to one particular Johnson
Red Samurai hate company suits -- watch your back on joint ops

profiles.name: Saeder-Krupp
profiles.betrayalNotes: S-K Johnsons are left alone a lot and quickly learn not to question missions
specialWarnings: Don't advertise as S-K -- disguise as mob guys, other corps, amateur scientists
Odd jobs; never same kind of job you'd get from other corps
Hans Brackhaus exception: legendary shadow figure, played by many actors. If he hires you, life gets complicated

profiles.name: Shiawase Corporation

paymentStyle.notes: Try asking for information as payment; Johnsons may share valuable intel if you prove your honor

specialWarnings: Almost all Johnsons from Marketing and Intelligence Forecast Division (MIFD)
Stiff backs, no humor, Bushido all the way
No adaptability when problems arise -- Bushido does not permit surrender or defeat

profiles.name: Wuxing Incorporated

paymentStyle.notes: Pays least among megas. Best alternative: smuggling/shipping services via their logistics network

specialWarnings: Always two Johnsons at every meet; at least one Awakened
They will use magic on you (typically Analyze Truth)
Never use magic (especially Manipulation spells) at a Wuxing meet
Triad associations can provide smuggling and travel assistance

syndicateJohnsons.description: Criminal syndicate Johnson profiles. Syndicate Johnsons are closer to the source of the run. You deal with the number two (Consigliere, Wakagashira, Lodge Master) not the boss.

profiles.name: Mafia (Cosa Nostra)
profiles.diversity: Very diverse -- Jewish, Irish, Polish, Black, Italian, and more

paymentStyle.notes: Typically pays what it promises. Either pay you fully or kill you

profiles.betrayalNotes: Low risk of not getting paid; high risk of violence if you show disrespect
specialWarnings: Any disrespect must be punished -- it is part of their rules

profiles.name: Yakuza

paymentStyle.notes: Pay well enough; prefer payment in kind -- vices, cyberware, hacking gear, weapons

profiles.betrayalNotes: Biggest hypocrites in shadows -- break all rules they insist you follow
specialWarnings: Get to business quickly; assume you are an idiot
Don't ask too many questions
Have claws in many corps through extortion/blackmail -- runs may have inside help
All-Japanese-human-male teams have fewest issues

profiles.name: Triads
profiles.betrayalNotes: Payback will come using magic -- find a warded place and plan to stay there
specialWarnings: Typically older gentlemen and ladies
Infuriatingly superstitious; talk in metaphors
Often pair runners with their own muscle as backup/diversion
You will never be a regular or a favorite -- purely mercenaries

profiles.name: Vory (Vory v Zakone)

paymentStyle.notes: Good for a certain charge; very pragmatic

profiles.betrayalNotes: Good people to work for if you aren't looking to make friends
specialWarnings: Rely on shadowrunners more than other syndicates
Epitome of violent men -- only problem-solving method is killing everyone involved
Cold people whose smiles never thaw the ice in their eyes

extremistJohnsons.description: Extremist organization Johnson profiles. Includes terrorist groups, eco-terrorists, insurgents, rebels, secret societies, political organizations, and magical groups.

profiles.name: Humanis
profiles.hiringBiasNotes: No qualms hiring metahumans -- getting caught proves their anti-meta narrative
specialWarnings: True agenda hidden behind 'pro-human not anti-metahuman' facade
Lazy -- like hiring same teams over and over
Example job: burn down orphanage for ork children

profiles.name: Illuminates of the New Dawn (IoND)

paymentStyle.notes: Reputation for wealth is overstated. Have information (blackmail, intel) and arcane items instead of cash

specialWarnings: Plans rely too much on magic and human manipulation
Light on hacking and violence in plans
Evaluate and inject your own expertise -- they'll be offended but come around
Smart but not as capable as they think at shadow ops

profiles.name: Neo-Anarchists

paymentStyle.notes: Worst pay of any employer. Their own people are idealist dreamers who can't get things done

specialWarnings: Get along well with shadowrunners
Have contacts among the poorest people but useful ones: street docs, hacker software, hardware, weapons, safehouses
Never a shortage of need for qualified runners

amateurJohnsons.description: People who do not normally operate in the shadows. Don't know shadowrunners or shadow rules.

paymentStyle.notes: Few have thousands of nuyen. Cash plus something personally precious (family heirloom)

specialWarnings: Intel is often completely wrong or wish-fulfillment thinking
Example: 'helpless missing girl' is actually an insect shaman
Two runner types: those who refuse most payment, those who exploit amateurs
Good karma but bad pay
